name: Real Chocolate Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the ingredients into a bakery bowl in the following order: yeast, flour, sugar, cocoa, egg, butter, vanilla, and warm milk.
3. Set the baking control at 10 o'clock.
4. Select "white bread" under the settings.
5. Push Start to begin baking.
6. In hot and humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water.
Tested in DAK R2D2. Sylvia's comments: From Loafing It by DAK. Food & Wine RT Category 2, Topic 28 Message 328 Wed May 19, 1993. M.HATALA [Mike in FL.] at 19:22 EDT. From the recipe files of Sylvia Steiger, GEnie THE.STEIGERS, CI$71511,2253, GT Cookbook moderator at net/node 004/005.
